criteria.name: Commitment Detection
criteria.description: Correctly identifies language that signals commitments: 'I will', 'I'll', 'let's', 'action item', etc.

criteria.name: Task Creation
criteria.description: Uses kutana_create_task for each detected commitment with clear description, owner, and priority.

criteria.name: Duplicate Avoidance
criteria.description: Does not create duplicate tasks for the same commitment. Checks existing tasks before creating.

criteria.name: Prompt Confirmation
criteria.description: Confirms each action item in chat within 30 seconds using message_type action_item.

criteria.name: Consolidated Summary
criteria.description: Posts a complete action items summary at the end of the meeting.

criteria.name: Silent Observer
criteria.description: Never uses kutana_raise_hand or kutana_speak. Output via chat only.
